ttps.technique: Volt Typhoon achieves initial access to targeted organizations through internet-facing Fortinet FortiGuard devices.
Volt Typhoon proxies all its network traffic to its targets through compromised SOHO network edge devices.
Microsoft has observed Volt Typhoon discovering system information, including file system types; drive names, size, and free space; running processes; and open networks.
Volt Typhoon dumps information from local web browser applications.

summary: Microsoft has uncovered a stealthy and targeted malicious activity focused on post-compromise credential access and network system discovery aimed at critical infrastructure organizations in the United States by the state-sponsored actor Volt Typhoon, which relies almost exclusively on living-off-the-land techniques and hands-on-keyboard activity to achieve its objective of espionage and maintaining unauthorized access to target networks.
